description: Calibration parameters extracted from R model (Florida FRS model input.R)

global_calibration.description: Global calibration factor for benefit model to match normal cost from valuation report

retire_refund_ratio.description: Ratio of vested members who choose to retire instead of refund (1.0 = 100% retire)

population_growth.description: Plan's active population growth assumption (0 = stable population)

normal_cost_calibration.description: Per-class normal cost calibration factors (val_report_nc / model_nc)

pvfb_term_current_adjustment.description: Remaining accrued liability not captured by PVFB calculations (val_report - model_preliminary)

headcount_adjustment.description: Ratios to adjust headcounts to match ACFR totals
headcount_adjustment.note: ECO, ESO, and Judges head counts are adjusted because ACFR does not provide detailed head counts

db_plan_ratios.description: Proportions of members who choose DB plan vs DC plan

total_active_membership.description: Total membership numbers from ACFR (includes DB and DC)

retiree_population.description: Number of annuitants for each class (retiree populations)

benefit_payments_current.description: Estimated benefit payments for each class (outflow * ben_payment_ratio)
